disease_type: Heterogeneous CKD and kidney injury/fibrosis diagnoses
tissue_compartment: Microdissected tubules from human kidney biopsy
disease_group_definition: 44 kidney-disease samples after excluding living donors and unaffected tumor-nephrectomy tissue
sample_size: 59 total; primary analysis 44 disease + 9 control; 6 unaffected tumor-nephrectomy samples excluded
processed_matrix_available: Yes; GEO series matrix downloaded and converted to 24845 gene symbols
metadata_available: Yes; sample diagnosis, tissue, platform and GSM accession
donor_sample_ID_available: GSM sample IDs available; separate longitudinal donor ID not provided
fibrosis_eGFR_IFTA_AKI_outcome_available: Diagnosis available; one explicit moderate-severe interstitial fibrosis sample; systematic eGFR/IFTA/AKI outcome unavailable in GEO metadata
signature_gene_coverage: TIMP1 100%; stringent module 399/421 (94.8%); core module 12/12; seven signatures 100%, TGF-beta 10/11, fibrosis 11/12
recommended_use: Independent external tubulointerstitial CKD/injury-repair validation; recommended for manuscript main results with heterogeneity caveat
exclusion_reason: Not excluded; not longitudinal AKI-to-CKD and disease group is etiologically heterogeneous

disease_type: Glomerular diseases in the NEPTUNE cohort
tissue_compartment: Microdissected tubulointerstitium from human kidney biopsy
disease_group_definition: 239 samples: FSGS 69, membranous nephropathy 48, minimal change disease 54, other glomerular disease 68
processed_matrix_available: Yes; normalized series data described as RMA/ComBat Entrez-gene expression
raw_data_available: Yes; CEL files and GSE133288_RAW.tar available
metadata_available: Yes; disease state, tissue, platform and GSM accession
donor_sample_ID_available: GSM sample IDs available; separate donor linkage not yet verified
fibrosis_eGFR_IFTA_AKI_outcome_available: Clinical NEPTUNE cohort, but fibrosis/eGFR/IFTA/outcome fields are not exposed in the reviewed GEO sample metadata
recommended_use: Independent tubulointerstitial replication and sensitivity analysis after GSE180394
exclusion_reason: Small healthy-donor control group; processed matrix and feature coverage still require formal preparation

disease_type: Multiple CKD etiologies including diabetic nephropathy, FSGS, IgAN, lupus nephritis and others
tissue_compartment: Microdissected glomeruli from human kidney biopsy
disease_group_definition: 173 disease samples across multiple CKD diagnoses
processed_matrix_available: Yes; normalized and ComBat-corrected expression described, with two platform batches
raw_data_available: Yes; CEL files and GSE99339_RAW.tar available
metadata_available: Partial; diagnosis is encoded in title/description and batch/platform are available
donor_sample_ID_available: GSM sample IDs available; separate donor linkage not verified
fibrosis_eGFR_IFTA_AKI_outcome_available: Study reports eGFR associations, but sample-level eGFR/IFTA/outcomes were not verified in the reviewed GEO metadata
recommended_use: Secondary glomerular compartment sensitivity analysis after harmonizing the two platform batches
exclusion_reason: Tumor-nephrectomy rather than healthy-donor controls; two platforms; glomerular compartment is less aligned with the tubular main hypothesis

disease_type: Heterogeneous CKD with one AKI sample in the Cprobe cohort
tissue_compartment: Microdissected glomeruli from human kidney biopsy
disease_group_definition: 47 kidney-disease samples after excluding living donors and unaffected tumor-nephrectomy tissue
sample_size: 62 total; potential primary contrast 47 disease + 9 control; 6 unaffected tumor-nephrectomy samples
processed_matrix_available: Yes; GEO series matrix is available
raw_data_available: Yes; CEL files and GSE180393_RAW.tar available
metadata_available: Yes; sample diagnosis, tissue, platform and GSM accession
donor_sample_ID_available: GSM sample IDs available; likely donor overlap with GSE180394 requires explicit matching
fibrosis_eGFR_IFTA_AKI_outcome_available: Diagnosis available; one AKI and one explicit moderate-severe interstitial fibrosis label; systematic outcome metadata unavailable
recommended_for_inclusion: No as independent validation; yes as supportive analysis
recommended_use: Paired glomerular-versus-tubular compartment concordance within the Cprobe source cohort
exclusion_reason: Not independent of GSE180394 and should not be counted as a separate external cohort
